title: Incident Recovery Orchestration
objective: Coordinate incident recovery with resumable checkpoints from triage through closure review.
trigger: A sev-2 incident requires multi-agent recovery coordination.

stages.name: Discover incident state
actions: Classify severity, impacted services, customer symptoms, current mitigations, and decision owner.
Create the recovery checkpoint transcript with current state and immediate unknowns.

checkpoint.name: Triage checkpoint
criteria: Severity and impacted services are explicit.

recoveryActions: Request missing triage facts from incident commander.

stages.name: Recovery execution
actions: Run the approved mitigation checklist and record each applied change with timestamp.
Compare service health before and after mitigation and update the transcript.

checkpoint.name: Mitigation checkpoint
criteria: Each mitigation has timestamp and owner.
Health comparison shows whether symptoms changed.

recoveryActions: Resume from triage checkpoint and choose fallback mitigation.

stages.name: Close review
actions: Verify recovery evidence against customer impact and service health criteria.
Write closure review with residual risk, follow-up owner, and resume token.

checkpoint.name: Closure checkpoint
criteria: Follow-up owner and due date are recorded.

recoveryActions: Escalate to incident commander and keep incident open.

logs: Append every stage transition to the incident checkpoint transcript.
metrics: Track time spent per stage and number of resume attempts.
auditTrail: Record mitigation owner, changed artifact, timestamp, and closure decision.

completionCriteria: Closure checkpoint passes with explicit residual risk.
Resume token and follow-up owner are recorded in the incident transcript.
